pick_implementation.title: Choose authentication method
pick_implementation.description: Choose the DiapStash API credentials for this account. Create separate API credentials for each DiapStash account.

auth.title: Connect DiapStash
auth.description: Sign in to your DiapStash account and approve access.

user.title: Enter DiapStash API credentials
user.description: Create an API client in the DiapStash account you want to add and enter its credentials here. Each DiapStash account should use its own API client credentials.

abort.credentials_already_configured: These DiapStash API credentials are already used by another entry. Create a separate API client for each DiapStash account.
abort.missing_configuration: No OAuth application credentials are configured.
abort.oauth_error: OAuth returned an invalid token response.
abort.oauth_unauthorized: OAuth authentication was rejected or expired.

application_credentials.description:
Create an API client in DiapStash Account and enter the Client ID and Client Secret here.

Redirect URL: `{redirect_url}`

Recommended scopes: `{scopes}`

More info: {more_info_url}

init.title: DiapStash options
init.description: Adjust polling and optional sensor groups.
